tree.cn: 大明的生日与太空旅行

children.notes: was 是 is 的过去式。
children.statement: 句子中的 was 是 is 的原形。
children.explanation: was 是 is 的过去式。

children.text: He got many presents from his family and friends.
children.cn: 他收到了来自家人和朋友的许多礼物。
children.notes: got 是 get 的过去式。
children.statement: got 是 go 的过去式。
children.explanation: got 是 get 的过去式，go 的过去式是 went。

children.text: Simon's mum bought him a present too.
children.cn: 西蒙的妈妈也给他买了一份礼物。
children.notes: bought 是 buy 的过去式。
children.statement: bought 是 build 的过去式。
children.explanation: bought 是 buy 的过去式。

children.text: It was a book about space travel.
children.cn: 那是一本关于太空旅行的书。
children.statement: about 在这里的意思是“关于”。
children.explanation: about 常用来引导介绍某物的主题。

children.text: Daming is very interested in space travel.
children.cn: 大明对太空旅行非常感兴趣。
children.notes: be interested in 表示“对……感兴趣”。
children.statement: be interested in 表示“对……感兴趣”。
children.explanation: 固定短语，主语是人时常用 -ed 结尾的形容词。

children.text: He loves the present very much.
children.statement: loves 是 love 的过去式。
children.explanation: loves 是 love 的单三形式，过去式是 loved。

children.text: Daming showed Simon his birthday present.
children.cn: 大明给西蒙看了他的生日礼物。
children.notes: show sb. sth. 表示“给某人看某物”。

children.text: Simon was interested in the book too.
children.cn: 西蒙也对这本书感兴趣。
children.notes: was 是 is 的过去式。
children.statement: was 的主语 Simon 是复数。

children.text: Daming asked him to read the book with him.
children.cn: 大明请他和他一起读这本书。
children.notes: ask sb. to do sth. 表示“邀请/要求某人做某事”。
children.statement: ask sb. to do sth. 表示要求某人做某事。

children.text: In the book, they saw many pictures of spaceships from China, Russia and the US.
children.cn: 在书里，他们看到了许多来自中国、俄罗斯和美国的宇宙飞船的照片。
children.notes: saw 是 see 的过去式；China, Russia and the US 是并列结构。
children.statement: saw 是 say 的过去式。
children.explanation: saw 是 see 的过去式，say 的过去式是 said。

children.text: They learnt a lot about space travel.
children.cn: 他们学到了很多关于太空旅行的知识。
children.notes: learnt 是 learn 的过去式；a lot about 表示“很多关于……的知识”。
children.explanation: learn 的过去式有两种写法。

children.text: Daming and Simon finished the book.
children.cn: 大明和西蒙读完了这本书。
children.statement: finished 是 finish 的将来时形式。
children.explanation: finished 是 finish 的过去式。

children.text: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
children.cn: 然后他们决定一起做一个纸宇宙飞船。
children.notes: decide to do sth. 表示“决定做某事”。
children.statement: decide to do sth. 后面接动词原形。
children.explanation: decide 常用不定式 to do 作宾语。

children.text: They gave the spaceship to Simon's mum.
children.cn: 他们把飞船给了西蒙的妈妈。
children.notes: gave 是 give 的过去式；give sth. to sb. 表示“把某物给某人”。
children.statement: gave 是 get 的过去式。
children.explanation: gave 是 give 的过去式，get 的过去式是 got。

children.text: Daming thanked her for the birthday present.
children.cn: 大明谢谢她送的生日礼物。
children.notes: thank sb. for sth. 表示“因某事感谢某人”。
children.statement: thank sb. for sth. 表示因某事感谢某人。

children.explanation: happy 在句中作表语，说明主语的状态。
